name: imagineer
description: Revolutionary design-to-LLM translation platform with microservices architecture

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:services
scripts.build:services: npm run build:parser && npm run build:translation && npm run build:export && npm run build:collaboration
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:services
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:client:watch & npm run test:services:watch
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:client:coverage && npm run test:services:coverage && npm run test:merge-coverage
scripts.test:services: npm run test:parser && npm run test:translation && npm run test:export && npm run test:collaboration
scripts.test:services:watch: concurrently "npm run test:parser:watch" "npm run test:translation:watch" "npm run test:export:watch" "npm run test:collaboration:watch"
scripts.test:services:coverage: npm run test:parser:coverage && npm run test:translation:coverage && npm run test:export:coverage && npm run test:collaboration:coverage
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:services && npm run test:integration:e2e
scripts.test:performance: npm run test:performance:load && npm run test:performance:memory
scripts.test:merge-coverage: nyc merge coverage coverage/merged.json && nyc report --reporter=html --reporter=lcov --temp-dir=coverage
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:services
scripts.lint:services: npm run lint:parser && npm run lint:translation && npm run lint:export && npm run lint:collaboration

author: Armando Diaz Silverio <armando@exxede.com>
